since_last: 69% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.04%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 69% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.14% · BTC +1.13% · Gold +0.01% · Nasdaq100 +0.70%. 69% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.04%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.04%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at +0.02%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +5.39%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +5.39%, MDB +5.33%, MU +5.03%, MRVL +5.02%, TER +4.88%. Laggards: ORCL -2.93%, AAPL -2.78%, DELL -2.42%, TLN -2.29%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.10% at $122.62
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.10% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
